name: World Legacy Cliffhanger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>焉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an attack is declared involving 2 Link Monsters: Shuffle all monsters on the field and in the GYs into the Decks. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, neither player can Link Summon.
eff: When an attack is declared involving 2 Link Monsters: Shuffle all monsters on the field and in the GYs into the Decks. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, neither player can Link Summon.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
